name: Leicestershire (United Kingdom)
description: A white field charged with a red five-petalled cinquefoil (the badge of the Earls of Leicester).
history: Based on the cinquefoil badge of the historic Earls of Leicester; registered with the Flag Institute as the flag of Leicestershire on 7 February 2021.

features.symbolism: the heraldic five-petalled cinquefoil, badge of the Earls of Leicester since the 12th century
